subject: Chitonga
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: ZYAMASIMPE
topics: a. Milaso – Oobu mbulembo bufwaafwi bupandulula mizeezo imwi.
b. Caano cabuponi bwamuntu – ooyu mulimo wabuponi bwamuntu uulembwa
abantu bambi kujatikizya buumi bwakwe azyintu nzyaakacita mubuponi bwakwe.
c. Caano camulembi lwakwe – eeci ncaano cilembwa amulembi lwakwe caamba
